calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Nov-16-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Oct-23-2018 Continued To Oct-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Miranda Martin for and with Maria Griselda Gutierrez (Petitioner).
Carlos Gutierrez (Petitioner's Father) also present.

Ms. Martin informed the Court that the Petitioner's Father is present, stated that she has a certified copy of the birth certificate and a letter from the Passport Center, and that Ms. Gutierrez had a prior license issued after 1997. Ms. Martin also stated that DMV informed her Client that someone else's finger prints were on file, that there was an identity theft issue, that DMV requested that both parties come down to the DMV office, that only her Client showed up and that originally a birth record was provided. Ms. Martin presented a certified copy of the birth certificate from the County of Stanislaus Modesto California listing the Father as Carlos Mendoza Gutierrez, and a copy of a California identification card, a permanent resident card and a social security card for Mr. Mendoza for the Court's review. The Petition to Establish Fact of Birth is continued to October 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file additional documents and the matter will be deemed under submission on that date.

Judge: Andrew Y. S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
